Legacy Reports (Markdown)

2026-W21 Achievements — 2026-W21

Achievements — 2026-W21

Period: 2026-05-18 → 2026-05-24

This week we shipped

Features

  • Slice #1 MVP end-to-end — First complete product feature delivered from definition to production (MED-46)
  • Budget Tracker visual polish — Refined UI/UX across the Budget Tracker module, with a full QA pass confirming correctness (MED-32, MED-33)
  • Opportunity Details Page beautification — Enhanced visual design and improved the Salesforce integration tab UX on the Opportunity page (MED-120, MED-121, MED-122, MED-134)

Bug Fixes

  • Tag Domain validation regression — Fixed input field errors erroneously triggered when verifying a Tag Domain; full plan, implementation, code review, and QA cycle completed in-week (MED-89, MED-90, MED-92, MED-93, MED-94)

Infrastructure & Automation

  • Relations reporting pipeline — Bootstrapped the med-relations repo and launched three automated weekly agents: DevPerformanceAgent, AchievementsAgent, and ReleaseNotesAgent — delivering automated team metrics from day one (MED-123, MED-125, MED-126, MED-128)
  • GitHub integration wired — Enabled agentic read/write of repo state across mediajel-gql-service, mediajel-dashboard, and amplication-nestjs-microservices (MED-24)
  • Engineering process established — Defined development workflow, hired first engineer, and established hiring plan (MED-1, MED-82)

By the numbers

  • 123 tickets closed
  • 29 PRs merged
  • 9 contributors active
